nasb.text: And He laid His hands on her; and immediately she was made erect again and began glorifying God.

esv.text: And he laid his hands on her, and immediately she was made straight, and she glorified God.

cnv.text: 耶穌用雙手按在她身上，她立刻直起腰來，頌讚　神。

ccb.text: 耶稣双手按在她身上，她的腰立刻直了，便颂赞上帝。

csbs.text: 然后耶稣按手在她身上，她的腰立刻直了，她就不住地荣耀神。
